pages.primary_scene_hint: A chaotic classroom with cats
pages.dominant_visual: Cats in a classroom, one upside down, one holding a 'MATH' book, a frog on the floor

pages.full_text:
Splat the cat goes to Cat School.
Splat likes to take Seymour.
Seymour is Splat's pet mouse.
Seymour rides in Splat's hat.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat the cat and Seymour the mouse in a classroom
pages.dominant_visual: Large black cat (Splat) with a mouse (Seymour) in his hat, carrying a red satchel, in a classroom setting

pages.full_text:
One morning,
Splat's teacher had big news.
She asked all the cats
to sit on the big red mat.
Seymour sat in Splat's hat.
6
pages.primary_scene_hint: Cats gathered on a mat in a classroom
pages.dominant_visual: Teacher cat holding a 'MUSIC' book, surrounded by student cats sitting on a red mat

pages.full_text:
“All of you will sing
on Parents' Night,”
Mrs. Wimpydimple said.
“If your singing is loud,
your parents will be proud.”
pages.primary_scene_hint: Teacher cat announcing Parents' Night
pages.dominant_visual: Close-up of Mrs. Wimpydimple (teacher cat) smiling, holding a 'MUSIC' book

pages.full_text:
“Will lots of parents be there?”
asked Splat.
“Yes. All the parents,”
said Mrs. Wimpydimple.
“Gulp!” said Splat.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat expressing worry about Parents' Night
pages.dominant_visual: Close-up of Mrs. Wimpydimple smiling, with a glimpse of Splat looking worried

pages.full_text:
Splat's tail wiggled wildly.
Splat was worried.
Splat was shy.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat feeling shy and worried
pages.dominant_visual: Splat looking worried, surrounded by other cats in a classroom setting

pages.full_text:
“I can't sing,” said Splat.

“Can you meow?” asked his teacher.
“I forget how to meow,” said Splat.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat struggling to sing or meow
pages.dominant_visual: Splat looking distressed, followed by Mrs. Wimpydimple smiling

pages.full_text:
“Can you hum?” asked his teacher.

“I even forget how to hum,”
said Splat.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat unable to hum
pages.dominant_visual: Splat looking even more distressed, then Mrs. Wimpydimple

pages.full_text:
“That's okay, Splat,”
said Mrs. Wimpydimple.
“I will help you sing.
We will all help you sing.”
pages.primary_scene_hint: Teacher and classmates offering help to Splat
pages.dominant_visual: Mrs. Wimpydimple and other cats looking encouraging, with musical notes floating around

pages.full_text:
Mrs. Wimpydimple sang first.
“La-la-la!” she sang.
The cats on the mat began to sing.
All except Splat.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Cats singing in class, Splat hesitates
pages.dominant_visual: Cats singing with open mouths, musical notes, Splat looking hesitant

pages.full_text:
“Now you try, Splat,”
said Mrs. Wimpydimple.
Splat opened his mouth.
Nothing came out.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat's first attempt to sing
pages.dominant_visual: Close-up of Mrs. Wimpydimple, then a glimpse of Splat with an open mouth

pages.full_text:
“You can do it, Splat,”
said his teacher.
Splat tried hard,
but all that came out
was a little squeak.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat's attempt results in a squeak
pages.dominant_visual: Splat trying to sing, Seymour (mouse) on his head looking surprised

pages.full_text:
Splat looked at Seymour.
Seymour was brave.
He was a mouse
in a room full of cats.
Splat could be brave, too.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat finds inspiration from Seymour's bravery
pages.dominant_visual: Splat looking at Seymour, who is on his head, surrounded by other cats

pages.full_text:
Splat opened his mouth again.
“La!” sang Splat.
The note was loud.
It was long.
And it was very, very flat!
17
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat sings a loud, flat note
pages.dominant_visual: Splat singing loudly with other cats reacting, some surprised, some amused

pages.full_text:
HA!
HA!
HA!
The cats on the mat went wild.
Splat was not trying to be funny,
but he was funny anyway.
18
pages.primary_scene_hint: Classmates laughing at Splat's singing
pages.dominant_visual: Cats laughing hysterically, Splat looking a bit confused but also pleased

pages.full_text:
“Sing just like that!”
said Mrs. Wimpydimple.
“You will be the star
with a mouse in his hat!”
“Maybe,” said Splat.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Mrs. Wimpydimple encourages Splat
pages.dominant_visual: Mrs. Wimpydimple smiling, Splat looking thoughtful with Seymour on his head

pages.full_text:
Splat went home after school.
“What if I forget my part?”
Splat asked Mom and Dad.
“You won't forget,”
they said to Splat.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat worries about forgetting his part at home
pages.dominant_visual: Splat at home with his parents, looking worried, parents reassuring him

pages.full_text:
“Maybe I will forget,”
said Splat.
21
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat's continued worry
pages.dominant_visual: Splat walking away from his mom, looking worried, entering a room

pages.full_text:
Splat put Seymour on his head.
Splat's tail wiggled
and Seymour jiggled.
Splat sang “la!”
The note still came out flat.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat practices singing at home
pages.dominant_visual: Splat practicing singing in front of a mirror, Seymour on his head, a red satchel hanging nearby

pages.full_text:
“Maybe I won't forget,”
said Splat.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat's wavering confidence
pages.dominant_visual: Splat looking out from behind a door, a bookshelf with books titled 'CAT TALES' visible

pages.full_text:
Soon it was Parents' Night.
All the parents came
to Splat's classroom.
The class stood on the big red mat.
Parents' Night
pages.primary_scene_hint: Parents' Night begins in the classroom
pages.dominant_visual: Classroom set up for Parents' Night, cats on the mat, parents in the audience, blackboard says 'Parents' Night'

pages.full_text:
“Let's begin!” said Mrs. Wimpydimple.
The class started to sing.
“La-la-la!” sang the cats.
But Splat stayed quiet.
He waited for his turn.
25
pages.primary_scene_hint: The class sings, Splat waits nervously
pages.dominant_visual: Cats singing, Mrs. Wimpydimple conducting, Splat waiting quietly

pages.full_text:
Mrs. Wimpydimple gave Splat a nod.
Splat was ready.
Seymour jumped onto Splat's head.
Seymour was ready, too.
Splat's tail wiggled wildly.
Splat opened his mouth very wide.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat prepares to sing on stage
pages.dominant_visual: Close-up of Splat, Seymour on his head, preparing to sing with a wide-open mouth

pages.full_text:
“La!” sang Splat,
and the note was flat.
It was very flat and very loud.

He opened his mouth even wider.
“LA!” sang Splat.

Then he opened his mouth
as wide as it could go.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat sings louder and flatter
pages.dominant_visual: Splat singing with increasing effort and a wide-open mouth, musical notes, Seymour on his head

pages.full_text:
“LAAA!” sang Splat,
and he fell off the mat.
SPLAT!

The class giggled.
The parents laughed.
And Splat laughed
the loudest of all.
28
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat's performance ends with a fall and laughter
pages.dominant_visual: Splat falling off the mat while singing, other cats and parents laughing joyfully

pages.full_text:
“You were the star!”
said Splat's mom.
“We are very proud of you,”
said Splat's dad.
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat being hugged by his parents (image is rotated 180 degrees)
pages.dominant_visual: Splat being hugged by his parents (image is rotated 180 degrees)

pages.full_text:
Mom and Dad hugged Splat.
“We love our cat who sings flat.”
pages.primary_scene_hint: Splat receives a loving hug from his parents
pages.dominant_visual: Splat being hugged by his parents

scene_graph.scene_summary: Introduction to Splat the cat, his pet mouse Seymour, and their daily routine at Cat School.

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A playful cat meow when Splat is introduced.
A curious mouse squeak when Seymour is introduced.

scene_graph.scene_summary: The teacher announces Parents' Night, where all cats will sing, causing the main character to feel worried.

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A subtle sound indicating an announcement, like a gentle bell or chime.
A subtle gulp sound to emphasize the cat's worry.

scene_graph.scene_summary: The main character expresses shyness and inability to sing, meow, or hum, feeling distressed about Parents' Night.

entry_cues.semantic_intent: Main character shows signs of nervousness

exit_cues.semantic_intent: Main character's complete inability to hum

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A subtle swishing sound for the cat's wiggling tail.
A soft, distressed cat sigh.

scene_graph.scene_summary: The teacher and other cats offer encouragement and demonstrate singing, but the main character remains hesitant.

entry_cues.semantic_intent: Teacher offers support to the main character

exit_cues.semantic_intent: Main character is the only one not singing

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A short, pleasant vocalization of 'la-la-la' by the teacher.
A soft chorus of cats singing 'la-la-la'.

scene_graph.scene_summary: The main character attempts to sing, producing only a squeak, then finds courage by observing Seymour's bravery.

entry_cues.semantic_intent: Teacher prompts main character to sing

exit_cues.semantic_intent: Main character resolves to be brave

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A small, high-pitched squeak from the cat.

trigger_structure.semantic_intent: Mouse's bravery inspires the main character

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A confident, small mouse squeak.

scene_graph.scene_summary: The main character sings a loud, flat note, causing the class to laugh, and the teacher encourages him to embrace his unique sound.

entry_cues.semantic_intent: Main character prepares to sing again

exit_cues.semantic_intent: Teacher encourages main character to be a star

trigger_structure.semantic_intent: Main character sings a loud, flat note

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A comically loud and flat cat vocalization.
Sound of multiple cats giggling and laughing.

scene_graph.scene_summary: The main character goes home, worries about forgetting his part, practices his flat note, and his confidence wavers.

entry_cues.semantic_intent: Main character returns home and talks to parents

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A soft door closing sound.

trigger_structure.semantic_intent: Main character expresses worry about forgetting

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A soft, worried cat sigh.
A short, flat cat vocalization during practice.

scene_graph.scene_summary: Parents arrive for Parents' Night, the class begins to sing, and the main character waits nervously for his turn.

exit_cues.semantic_intent: Main character waits for his turn to sing

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A soft murmur of parents arriving and settling.
A soft, harmonious chorus of cats singing 'la-la-la'.

scene_graph.scene_summary: The main character performs his loud, flat note with increasing enthusiasm, eventually falling off the mat, leading to joyful laughter from everyone.

entry_cues.semantic_intent: Main character prepares for his performance

exit_cues.semantic_intent: Everyone, including main character, laughs joyfully

audio_opportunities.event_summary: An energetic swishing sound for the cat's tail.

trigger_structure.semantic_intent: Main character sings louder and wider

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A series of increasingly loud and flat cat vocalizations.

trigger_structure.semantic_intent: Main character falls off the mat

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A soft, comical thud as the cat falls.

trigger_structure.semantic_intent: Audience and class laugh at the performance

audio_opportunities.event_summary: Sound of giggling and joyful laughter from the audience.

scene_graph.scene_summary: The main character's parents express immense pride and love for their unique cat who sings flat, ending the story on a warm, accepting note.

entry_cues.semantic_intent: Parents express pride in main character's performance

audio_opportunities.event_summary: A soft, warm sound of a hug.
